title: astragalus cliffordii
intro: Astragalus cliffordii, also known as Huang Qi or Mongolian milkvetch, is a perennial legume plant native to the steppes of Mongolia and China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus cliffordii include boosting the immune system, reducing fatigue and stress, and improving cardiovascular health, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Astragalus cliffordii is commonly prepared as a decoction or tea, and its extracts are also used in capsule or powder form for various health benefits.
